task.summary: Default task
vsearch consensus functions in paralogs.py
fixing bug in matched_edges_from_hmm
fixing types iin BGC_candidate
modify filter_components_hmm() in order to exclude paths where the probe only matches a few AAs.
fixing return object bug in class Alignment_fragment, _get_nuc_coordinates(), should return [None, None] when no correspondence between two scaffolds is found, returned None
functions to handle vsearch consensuses from the output of SPAdes and SAUTE
correct bug in get_vsearch_kmer_consensus() that terminate the pile search without processing the last element of the pile.
small cosmetic changes
small cosmetic changes
create mmseqs cluster parser for creating consensus sequences from probe amino acid sequences.
type annotation fixes
type annotation fixes
fixes bug in gff_parser that returned from nucleotides-protein coordinates adds a function in miniprot.py that finds the best matching probe per gene
fixes bug in gff_parser that returned from nucleotides-protein coordinates adds a function in miniprot.py that finds the best matching probe per gene
minor changes
classes for filtering scaffolds after SAUTE assembly and before vsearch clustering. classes for separating non-overlapping sequences after vsearch clustering.
miniprot.py is updated with a method that allows to save the sequence of the best overall aligning probe to all the scaffolds from all samples for a given gene
clean print statements
merge_intervals modification, do not merge interval that have a single nucleotide overlap
new algorithm for translating the sequences based upon orfipy
new algorithm for translating the sequences based upon orfipy
new algorithm for translating the sequences based upon orfipy
new algorithm for translating the sequences based upon orfipy
change in Cds repr string modifications in the ranking procedure of probes. Probes that do not match a scaffold get penalized
modify find_common_exon() by adding a graph search for the longest continuous path of exons

The implementation of directed graph for finding the longest sequence of non-overlapping exons failed in the case of non-adjacent exons. It was changed to an adaptation of the transdecoder parser script.
Cosmetic changes.
save exon, intron msa
save exon, intron msa
documentation change
in the saved alignment, for each sequence, the exon boundaries are modified in order to match the coordinates on the probe of the most common exon boundaries
refactoring the exon search algorithm
refactoring the exon search algorithm, adding dataclass doc
paralogy search updates to work with the new exon discovery algorithm
a working version of the exon identification pipeline
a working version of miniprot.py that do not infer individual exon boundaries
Adding docstring to the module
ignore sequences that have the wrong orientation instead of exiting
fixed error in save_best_probe that produced a key error when no best probe was recovered
fixed error in save_best_probe that produced a key error when no best probe was recovered
starting to fix the DFS
continuing the fix to the DFS
adding a new type of sequence type called 'genotig' that trims scaffolds to the probe boundaries
coloring with queue
functions to sample as much edge diversity out of colored paths
functions to sample as much edge diversity out of colored paths
cleaning miniprot.py

MESSAGE.value: merge_intervals modification, do not merge interval that have a single nucleotide overlap
new algorithm for translating the sequences based upon orfipy
change in Cds repr string modifications in the ranking procedure of probes. Probes that do not match a scaffold get penalized
modify find_common_exon() by adding a graph search for the longest continuous path of exons

The implementation of directed graph for finding the longest sequence of non-overlapping exons failed in the case of non-adjacent exons. It was changed to an adaptation of the transdecoder parser script.
Cosmetic changes.
save exon, intron msa
documentation change
in the saved alignment, for each sequence, the exon boundaries are modified in order to match the coordinates on the probe of the most common exon boundaries
refactoring the exon search algorithm
refactoring the exon search algorithm, adding dataclass doc
paralogy search updates to work with the new exon discovery algorithm
a working version of the exon identification pipeline
a working version of miniprot.py that do not infer individual exon boundaries
Adding docstring to the module
ignore sequences that have the wrong orientation instead of exiting
fixed error in save_best_probe that produced a key error when no best probe was recovered
starting to fix the DFS
continuing the fix to the DFS
adding a new type of sequence type called 'genotig' that trims scaffolds to the probe boundaries
coloring with queue
functions to sample as much edge diversity out of colored paths
cleaning miniprot.py
